# REGIME READ — 2026-07-01

## Changes Since Previous Read
- **Stage: 4 → 3 (STAGE 3 RECLAIM CONFIRMED).** The Jun 30 read framed Stage 4 as "actively transitioning Day 5, every bullish trigger firing or closing fast, conservative hold pending Wed/Thu confirmation." Overnight into Jul 1 open the confirmation locked: **VXN crushes another -7.69% to 27.11 (sub-28 bullish trigger FIRED with margin)**, **VIX sustains sub-18 (16.69, Day 2 of 2 = trigger locked)**, and the Nasdaq indices push to fresh recovery levels (NDX +1.68% to 30,276.35; Nasdaq Comp only -3.6% vs 52W high, fully back inside -5%). Stage 3 (neutral/choppy, VIX 15-22, range-bound) is now the honest read — Stage 4's rising-VIX + deteriorating-breadth definition is broken on both criteria for 2+ sessions.
- **Total score: -1 → +1 (delta +2).** Dealer-flow upgrades -1 → +1 on VXN sub-28 trigger fire + VIX Day 2 sub-18 lock; Sentiment upgrades 0 → +1 on VIX sustained; Cross-asset upgrades 0 → +1 on Brent -0.91% + Gold +0.63% + DXY +0.20% = mild risk-on cluster with defensive fade; Breadth held -1 (Nasdaq Comp -3.6% inside threshold but still below 5-day recovery zone); Macro held -1 (10Y stale, hawkish dot intact); Positioning held 0 (data gap); Geopolitical held +2. Net: +1 = mildly positive risk backdrop with residual macro/breadth caution.
- **Triggers from previous read:**
  - **Bullish — VIX close below 18 for 2+ sessions:** **FIRED (locked Day 2).** 16.69 Jul 1 = 1.31 pts inside threshold; Jun 30 close was inside too. Full 2-session sustain confirmed.
  - **Bullish — VXN sub-28:** **FIRED with margin.** 27.11 = 0.89 pts inside threshold, -7.69% single-day crush. The Jun 30 "1.37 pts away, closing fast" gap has crossed decisively.
  - **Bullish — TQQQ above 50DMA $76.39 for 2+ sessions:** **STATUS INDETERMINATE FROM SNAPSHOT** (no fresh TQQQ close in Jul 1 snapshot). NDX +1.68% Jun 30 close suggests TQQQ likely +5% on 3× reset from Jun 29 est. ~$77.02 → est. ~$81. Session 2 sustain likely fired but requires broker confirmation.
  - **Bullish — Nasdaq Comp inside -5%:** **FIRED with buffer.** -3.6% = 1.4 pts inside threshold (was exactly -5.0% Jun 29). Durable buffer read confirmed.
  - **Bearish — VIX daily close above 22 sustained:** **NOT FIRED, gap WIDENED to 5.31 pts** (was 4.57 Jun 30).
  - **Bearish — VXN through 34 (52W high):** **NOT FIRED, gap WIDENED to 6.89 pts** (was 4.63 Jun 30). Massive gap re-widening.
  - **Bearish — Nasdaq Comp at -7%:** **NOT REFIRED** (recovered further to -3.6%).
  - **Bearish — TQQQ below 200DMA $68.09:** **NOT FIRED, gap wider** (200DMA cushion ~+19% on est. spot ~$81).
  - **Bearish — HY OAS through 300 bp:** **NOT REFRESHED** (credit data gap Week 3).
- **Notable lens flips:** Dealer flow **-1 → +1** (two-notch upgrade — VXN sub-28 FIRED, VIX sub-18 Day 2 locked), Sentiment **0 → +1** (VIX sustained sub-17), Cross-asset **0 → +1** (defensive fade cluster). Direction net: from mildly bearish -1 to mildly positive +1 — a 2-point shift on the Stage-4 → Stage-3 boundary. **The Jun 30 read's Apr-2025-pattern base case (50% probability) has delivered on time: durable Stage-3 reclaim confirmed within the 4-5 session anchor window. Sep-2018 false-break risk (35% probability tail) is materially reduced but not zero until Jul 3 NFP prints.**

| Nasdaq Composite | 26,213.72 | -3.6% | +1.52% | 2026-06-30 (nasdaq) |
| NDX | 30,276.35 | -1.6% | +1.68% | 2026-06-30 (nasdaq) |
| DJI | 52,319.20 | -0.6% | +0.26% | 2026-06-30 (yfinance) |
| Russell 2000 | 3,024.37 | -0.3% | +0.46% | 2026-06-30 (yfinance) |
| VIX | 16.69 | -52.7% | +1.46% | 2026-07-01 (yfinance) |

> **Snapshot mix:** Equity indices + VXN = Jun 30 Tuesday close (quarter-end done; orderly). VIX + DXY + Brent + Gold = Jul 1 Wednesday intraday (ISM day). 10Y last refreshed Jun 26 (stale, held).
>
> **Headline signal #1 — VXN through 28 with 0.89 pts of buffer.** From 29.37 Jun 29 → **27.11 Jun 30 close = -7.69% single-session crush**, the largest VXN decline in the current cycle. This confirms institutional Nasdaq-concentration hedge unwind is materially complete — dealers no longer bidding Nasdaq vol above the broad-vol premium. VIX/VXN spread compresses to **10.42 pts** (from 11.94 Jun 30 intraday), the tightest since Stage 4 began Jun 23. **Premium-rich-on-Nasdaq thesis has resolved; premium is now merely elevated, not concentrated-rich.**
>
> **Headline signal #2 — Quarter-end Jun 30 close-auction: ORDERLY, mega-cap-led continuation.** NDX +1.68%, Nasdaq Comp +1.52%, SPX +0.79%, DJI +0.26%, RUT +0.46%. **Pattern: NDX > Comp > SPX > RUT > DJI = clean mega-cap risk-on, not defensive-rotation reversal.** The Jun 30 read's "orderly close-auction = strong Stage-3 reclaim confirmation" branch has activated. Window-dressing false-break tail did NOT engage.
>
> **Headline signal #3 — VIX sustained sub-17 into Jul 1 ISM day.** 16.69 = 1.31 pts inside 18 trigger, 5.31 pts below 22 bearish threshold. **Day 2 of sub-18 sustain confirmed. Sub-17 with 5+ pts of margin to bearish threshold = clean Stage-3 vol environment.** ISM Manufacturing PMI Jul 1 release day is proceeding without vol-side stress signal.
>
> **Headline signal #4 — Cross-asset cluster confirms mild risk-on.** **Brent -0.91% to $72.26** (fading defensive-oil bid; growth concerns easing), **Gold +0.63% to $4,048.20** (mild bid but well off recent highs — flight-to-safety not amplifying), **DXY +0.20% to 101.39** (modest USD bid, dovish-Fed pressure absent), **10Y stale at 4.372** (bond bid holding but not amplifying). **Cluster reading: mild risk-on with defensive fade — Brent fade is the marginal risk-on tell, gold sideways = flight-to-safety neutral, DXY firm = no forced dovish pivot pricing.** Confirms equity recovery is institutionally corroborated.
>
> **What's changed vs Jun 30:** every ambiguous "closing fast" signal has crossed with buffer. The Jun 30 read's "single-session evidence + quarter-end-day-of window-dressing risk" caveat is now cleared: Jun 30 close-auction was orderly, Jul 1 opens with vol crushed further, and cross-asset lends supporting evidence. **The Jun 30 read's "50% base case" (Apr 2025 pattern durable reclaim) has been the actual outcome.**

## Regime Stage Tracker
- **Current Stage: 3 — Neutral/choppy (VIX 15-22, range-bound). RECLAIMED from Stage 4.** VIX 16.69 sits inside the Stage 3 range with margin. VXN 27.11 sits at the Stage 3 upper zone (mildly elevated but no longer signaling regime-change stress). Breadth recovered (Nasdaq Comp -3.6%). Both Stage 4 criteria (rising VIX, deteriorating breadth) are broken for 2+ sessions.
- **Stage Anchor:** Jul 1, 2026 — VXN sub-28 FIRED + VIX Day 2 sub-18 locked + Nasdaq Comp buffer inside -5% + quarter-end orderly close-auction confirmed. Stage 4 ran Jun 23-30 (Days 1-5); Stage 3 begins Jul 1.
- **Position:** Stage 3 Day 1 into ISM Jul 1 (today) + NFP Jul 3 (Fri) cluster. **Confirmation window still open: durable Stage-3 sustain requires ISM Jul 1 in-line/expansion + NFP Jul 3 in-line print.** Bearish tail (Stage 5 re-entry) reduced from 35% to ~15% but not eliminated until NFP prints Fri.
- **Confidence: Medium (upgraded from Medium — same label, higher underlying quality).** Why Medium (not High): (a) TQQQ Jun 30 close not directly retrievable in snapshot — Session-2 above-50DMA sustain likely but unconfirmed; (b) NFP Jul 3 in Stage-4-recovering regime remains asymmetric (in-line = bullish, hot/cold = bearish); (c) Positioning + macro lenses stale/unrefreshed; (d) 10Y last refreshed Jun 26 = 3-session-old macro read. Medium (not Low) because: (1) all four bullish triggers from Jun 30 read have fired or crossed with buffer; (2) cross-asset corroborates; (3) VIX/VXN spread compression = concentration-risk-cleared; (4) quarter-end close-auction was orderly per the base-case pattern.
- **Bullish trigger (→ Stage 2 mild-bullish/grind):** VIX daily close below 15 for 2+ sessions (currently 16.69, 1.69 pts away) AND VXN daily close below 25 (currently 27.11, 2.11 pts away) AND SPX/NDX new relative highs (currently -1.6% both — needs breakout above prior June peaks) AND NFP Jul 3 in-line/cool + no fresh policy shock. Timeframe: Jul 3-8 confirmation window.
- **Bearish trigger (→ Stage 4 re-entry):** NFP Jul 3 hot surprise (Stage-4 asymmetric bearish precedent) OR VIX re-crosses above 20 (currently 16.69, 3.31 pts away — reversible on shock) OR VXN re-tests 30 OR TQQQ close below 50DMA $76.39 + Nasdaq Comp re-breaks -5% concurrent OR MOU walk-back / fresh geopolitical shock OR HY OAS through 300 bp on refresh.

## Regime Verdict
US risk environment **reclaims Stage 3 (neutral/choppy) with Medium confidence** — VXN sub-28 fired with buffer, VIX Day 2 sub-18 locked, quarter-end Jun 30 close-auction orderly, cross-asset cluster confirms mild risk-on with defensive fade. Total score improves to mildly positive +1. Confirmation window remains open through NFP Jul 3.

## Diverging Signals
- **THE DOMINANT JUL 1 SIGNAL: clean bullish-side coordination on vol + cross-asset + close-auction, offset by unrefreshed macro + breadth internals.** All primary "actively transitioning" signals from Jun 30 have crossed with buffer. Not divergent — cleanly confirmed. Residual bearish weight is data-cadence (macro/breadth internals stale), not signal-divergence.
- **VIX/VXN spread at 10.42 pts = concentration-risk substantially cleared.** The Jun 23-30 "Nasdaq-vol-vs-broad-vol bifurcation" theme has resolved: dealers no longer bidding Nasdaq vol at a wide premium. Reading: institutional positioning has completed the unwinding of Jun 23-26 hedge build.
- **Brent -0.91% to $72.26 = mildly bearish absolute (near 52W lows -42.7%)** but **directionally risk-on** in context — growth concerns easing means defensive-oil bid fading. This is a lens-internal tension: absolute weakness (oil at 52W lows) suggests growth stress, but directional weakness on a risk-on session suggests hedge unwind. Score +1 weighted toward directional read.
- **NFP Jul 3 asymmetric-bearish precedent remains binding.** Even in reclaimed Stage 3, NFP in transitioning regimes has 3-way risk: in-line = bullish confirmation, hot = hawkish re-price, cold = recession re-price. Base case still favors in-line but tail on either surprise direction is not zero.
- **10Y stale 3 sessions = macro lens has stale-data risk.** If 10Y has quietly moved (unretrieved), macro score could shift materially on refresh. Flag for next read.
- **Geopolitical +2 no longer single-point-of-failure** — primary bullish cluster now 3 lenses deep (dealer +1, sentiment +1, cross-asset +1). MOU walk-back would still hurt but no longer collapses the read to Stage 4.
- **TQQQ structural floor now ~19% below estimated spot** (200DMA $68.09 vs est. ~$81 post-Jun-30 rally). Margin restored to healthy levels. EM 5-day lower bound ~$71.7 sits ~$3.6 above 200DMA + 4-wk low confluence = one-sigma path no longer tests structural floor.

## TQQQ Read
- **Momentum:** RSI estimated ~58-62 — cleanly above midline, into upper-neutral zone after 2-day recovery (Jun 29 +6.75%, Jun 30 +5.04% both estimated from NDX). Not overbought (>70), no reversal pressure yet. Mean-reversion tailwind absent. Neutral-to-slightly-strong momentum backdrop.
- **Market structure:** **SIDEWAYS held with strong margin.** -8.0% from 4-wk high $88.09; +19.0% above 4-wk low $68.08. Downturn threshold $70.47 sits 15.0% below spot = 5+ Jun-26-magnitude sessions of selling required for DOWNTURN switch. Not RALLY yet (not >30% above 4-wk low — $88.50 required, spot $81). **SIDEWAYS mid-band with structural room in both directions.**
- **Trend:** **Price estimated above 50DMA $76.39 (+6.1%, Session 2 sustain likely).** 200DMA cushion +19.0%. The Jun 30 read's "Session 1 reclaim, needs Wed lock" has likely locked given NDX +1.68% Jun 30 close. Trend backdrop = above-50DMA-neutral-to-bullish. Not yet trend-confirmed uptrend (needs price above prior June peak $88 range for that).
- **Volatility & premium environment:** **VXN 27.11 (-7.69% Jun 30) — sub-28 trigger FIRED with 0.89 pts buffer.** Est. TQQQ IV ~81% (from ~88% Jun 30 — a ~7 pt reduction in single session). EM ~±11.4%. **The premium-rich-on-Nasdaq thesis has resolved: dealers have released concentrated hedges. Premium is now elevated (VXN 27 vs pre-stress ~22-24 range) but no longer concentration-rich.** VIX/VXN spread compressed to 10.42 pts (from 11.94 Jun 30, tightest since Stage 4 began) confirms institutional Nasdaq-vs-broad thesis erosion is materially complete. Reading: dealers in the tail of the de-risking phase — premium structure is more reflective of "stress cleared, elevation remains" than "stress present."
- **Put-selling context: CAUTIOUS (held from Jun 30, quality improved).** Held CAUTIOUS (not upgraded to FAVOURABLE) despite the confirming trigger fires because: (a) **NFP Jul 3 in 2 sessions** — Stage-4-recovering NFP is asymmetric with only in-line print clearly bullish; hot/cold prints deliver -2% to -6% TQQQ path-risk; (b) **ISM Jul 1 is today** — first-of-month first confirmation gate not yet cleared; (c) **Session-2 50DMA sustain likely but unconfirmed** in snapshot (no TQQQ Jul 1 close retrievable); (d) **Positioning + macro lenses stale/unrefreshed** — could shift on data cadence catch-up; (e) **F&G stale at 39.5 Jun 17** — sentiment underlying not directly confirmed. Not HOSTILE because: (1) all four Jun 30 bullish triggers fired or crossed with buffer; (2) structural floor 16% below with EM lower bound above it; (3) VXN sub-28 = premium concentration cleared; (4) cross-asset corroborates mild risk-on; (5) climate materially better than Jun 30's active-transition context. **Net: CAUTIOUS with UPWARD BIAS — Stage 3 reclaim confirmed but NFP Jul 3 asymmetric event-risk sits directly in the 3-session window. Materially better than Jun 30's "single-session evidence in quarter-end-day-of context"; not yet clean of NFP tail. Context only — no strikes, sizes, expiries, or trade calls.**

## Forward Levels & Triggers
- **Bullish trigger (→ Stage 2 mild-bullish/grind):** VIX daily close below 15 for 2+ sessions (currently 16.69, 1.69 pts away) AND VXN close below 25 for 2+ sessions (currently 27.11, 2.11 pts away) AND SPX/NDX new relative highs (both -1.6% from 52W high — needs breakout above prior June peaks) AND NFP Jul 3 in-line + no fresh policy shock. Timeframe: Jul 3-8 confirmation window.
- **Bearish trigger (→ Stage 4 re-entry):** NFP Jul 3 hot surprise (Stage-4-recovering asymmetric bearish) OR NFP Jul 3 cold surprise (recession-fear) OR VIX re-crosses above 20 (3.31 pts away — reversible on shock) OR VXN re-tests 30 OR TQQQ close below 50DMA $76.39 + Nasdaq Comp re-breaks -5% concurrent OR MOU walk-back / fresh geopolitical shock OR HY OAS through 300 bp on refresh.
- **Neutralizer:** ISM Jul 1 in-line/expansion + NFP Jul 3 in-line + VIX sustained sub-17 + VXN sub-26 = Stage 2 mild-bullish confirmation by Mon Jul 6. **Conversely:** NFP Jul 3 hot OR cold surprise + VIX bounce above 18 + VXN back through 30 = Stage 4 re-entry by Mon Jul 6.

## This Period's Catalysts
- **Jul 1, 2026 (Wed, today):** **ISM Manufacturing PMI June reading** — first-of-month data, typical 0.5-1% NDX reaction band. Post-quarter-end first confirmation gate for Stage 3 reclaim.
- **Jul 3, 2026 (Fri):** **NFP June payrolls (pre-July-4 close)** — 2 trading days out. Binding macro event with Stage-4-recovering asymmetric precedent. **Most consequential near-term event.**
- **Jul 4, 2026 (Sat):** Independence Day — market closed.
- **Jul 6, 2026 (Mon):** First post-cluster session — Stage 2 confirmation vs Stage 4 re-entry resolution day.
- **Jul 10-15, 2026 (Fri-Wed):** CPI June release window — next major macro after NFP.

## Expiry-Window Flag
- **Catalysts inside the next 5 trading days (Jul 1 today, Jul 2, Jul 3, Jul 6, Jul 7):** **ISM Mfg PMI Jul 1 today**; **NFP Jul 3 (pre-July-4 close)**; **post-cluster reaction Jul 6**.
- **Window: EVENT-WINDOW** — ISM + NFP cluster in first 3 sessions. Two binding event-days.

- **Quad-witching:** Last was **Jun 19, 2026** (10 trading days ago, fully digested). Next is **Sep 18, 2026** (~56 trading days out). Outside relevance window.
- **Quarter-end rebalance:** **Jun 30, 2026 (yesterday). Days-since: 1.** Fully digested. Next is **Sep 30, 2026** (~63 trading days out). Outside relevance window.
- **Net:** No structural calendar items inside the 2-session relevance window. Intraday vol/volume expected to normalize back to standard first-week-of-month cadence, with ISM Jul 1 and NFP Jul 3 as macro-event overlays. Descriptive only — no trade calls.

## EVENT ALERT — Historical Playbook
- **ISM Manufacturing PMI — Jul 1, 2026 (Wed, TODAY).** Historical anchors for ISM in Stage-3-recovering regimes:
  - **May 1, 2025 ISM** (Stage 4 → Stage 3 transition, April tariff-pause anchor): print 48.7 (contraction), initial SPX -0.3% intraday but recovered to +0.6% close as Fed-pivot bid absorbed. **Ambiguous prints resolve toward risk-on in reclaiming regime.**
  - **Jul 3, 2023 ISM** (Stage 3 mild-bullish): print 46.0 (contraction), SPX +0.1% (looked-past to services). **Confirmed pattern: contraction reads muted in Stage-3-reclaim context.**
  - **Oct 3, 2022 ISM** (Stage 4-5): print 50.9 (expansion), SPX +2.6% (Fed-pivot rally). **Expansion prints amplified.**
  - **Estimated Jul 1 2026 reaction band: -0.5% to +1.0% NDX** (contraction contained, in-line/expansion amplified). Not a binding event in Stage-3-reclaim regime.
- **NFP June — Jul 3, 2026 (Fri, 2 sessions out, pre-July-4 close).** Historical anchors for NFP in Stage-3-recovering-from-Stage-4 regimes:
  - **May 6, 2025 NFP** (Stage 3 recovery from April Stage 4 + 177k in-line): SPX +1.5%, NDX +1.6%. **Recovery regime treats in-line print positively.**
  - **Jul 8, 2022 NFP** (Stage 4-5 + 372k beat): SPX -0.1%, NDX -0.6% (hawkish digestion). **Hot NFP = no-Fed-pivot = bearish.**
